src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace the Fuel HTTP client library with Spring's RestTemplate for making HTTP requests.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Fuel is a third-party library that may be removed or incompatible; migrating to standard Spring Web client ensures compatibility with the Spring ecosystem and JDK 11.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.before:
import com.github.kittinunf.fuel.core.Headers.Companion.ACCEPT
import com.github.kittinunf.fuel.core.extensions.authentication
import com.github.kittinunf.fuel.core.isClientError
import com.github.kittinunf.fuel.core.isServerError
import com.github.kittinunf.fuel.httpGet
import com.github.kittinunf.fuel.jackson.responseObject
import com.github.kittinunf.result.Result

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update imports to use new model classes and utility classes introduced in the refactoring.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: The old model classes (AltinnReportee, Subject) and error exceptions are replaced or removed, causing compile errors if not updated.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Inject AltinnrettigheterProxyKlientContext into the constructor to access RestTemplateBuilder and OIDC context.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: The class no longer accepts TokenContext directly but relies on context injection for building RestTemplate and retrieving user tokens.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Refactor hentOrganisasjoner to use TilgangskontrollUtils for retrieving the logged-in user instead of passing TokenContext.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: TokenContext is no longer passed; the method must derive user identity from the security context via TilgangskontrollUtils.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.before:
fun hentOrganisasjoner(
        tokenContext: TokenContext,
        subject: Subject,
        serviceCode: ServiceCode,
        serviceEdition: ServiceEdition
): List<AltinnReportee>
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
fun hentOrganisasjoner(
        serviceCode: ServiceCode,
        serviceEdition: ServiceEdition
): List<AltinnOrganisasjon>

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace Fuel-based HTTP call in hentOrganisasjonerViaAltinnrettigheterProxy with RestTemplate exchange.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Fuel API is removed; RestTemplate must be used to perform the HTTP GET request and handle responses.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
val failsafeRestTemplate: RestTemplate =
        restTemplateBuilder.errorHandler(
            RestTemplateProxyErrorHandler()
        )
        .build()

val respons = failsafeRestTemplate.exchange(
    getAltinnRettigheterProxyURI(serviceCode, serviceEdition),
    HttpMethod.GET,
    getAuthHeadersForInnloggetBruker(),
    object : ParameterizedTypeReference<List<AltinnOrganisasjon>>() {}
)

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace Fuel-based HTTP call in hentOrganisasjonerIAltinn with RestTemplate exchange.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Fuel API is removed; RestTemplate must be used to perform the fallback HTTP GET request.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
val restTemplate: RestTemplate = restTemplateBuilder.build()

val respons = restTemplate.exchange(
    getAltinnURI(fnr, serviceCode, serviceEdition),
    HttpMethod.GET,
    getHeaderEntityForAltinn(),
    object : ParameterizedTypeReference<List<AltinnOrganisasjon>>() {}
)

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add helper methods to construct URIs using UriComponentsBuilder.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Fuel's parameter handling is replaced by explicit URI construction in RestTemplate.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add helper methods to construct HTTP headers for authentication and API keys.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Fuel's header manipulation is replaced by HttpEntity construction in RestTemplate.
